hyperedges.label: Triple-Graph MCP Investigation: OpenMetadata + Graphiti + GitNexus power the 10-step autonomous pipeline
Agentic Metadata Gap-Closing Features: F11-F18 collectively close 8 gaps from The New Stack article
Hybrid Deployment: Vercel Static Frontend + Fly.io Always-On Backend + Neon Postgres + Langfuse Cloud
